• {{ task.title }} - Category: {{ task.category }} - Completed: {{ task.completed ? "True" : "False" }}

    Title: {{ task.title }}

    Category: {{ task.category }}

    Completed: {{ task.completed ? "Yes" : "No" }}

// import { Component, OnInit } from '@angular/core'; // import { Task } from 'src/app/models/Itask'; // import { TaskService } from 'src/app/services/task.service'; // @Component({ // selector: 'app-task-list', // templateUrl: './task-list.component.html', // styleUrls: ['./task-list.component.css'], // }) // export class TaskListComponent implements OnInit { // tasks: Task[] = []; // filteredTasks: Task[] = []; // categories: string[] = []; // selectedCategory: string | undefined; // sortField: string = 'dueDate'; // Default sorting field // sortDirection: string = 'asc'; // Default sorting direction // constructor(private taskService: TaskService) {} // ngOnInit(): void { // this.loadTasks(); // } // loadTasks(): void { // this.taskService.getTasks().subscribe((tasks) => { // this.tasks = tasks; // this.filteredTasks = tasks; // this.categories = Array.from(new Set(tasks.map((task) => task.category))); // this.sortTasks(); // }); // } // deleteTask(taskId: number): void { // this.taskService.deleteTask(taskId).subscribe(() => { // this.loadTasks(); // }); // } // filterTasksByCategory(): void { // if (this.selectedCategory) { // this.filteredTasks = this.tasks.filter( // (task) => task.category === this.selectedCategory // ); // } else { // this.filteredTasks = this.tasks; // } // this.sortTasks(); // } // sortTasks(): void { // this.filteredTasks.sort((a, b) => { // const aValue = (a as any)[this.sortField]; // const bValue = (b as any)[this.sortField]; // if (aValue === bValue) { // return 0; // } // if (this.sortDirection === 'asc') { // return aValue < bValue ? -1 : 1; // } else { // return aValue > bValue ? -1 : 1; // } // }); // } // // task-listing.component.ts // onSortChange(event: any): void { // const field = event?.target?.value; // if (this.sortField === field) { // this.sortDirection = this.sortDirection === 'asc' ? 'desc' : 'asc'; // } else { // this.sortField = field; // this.sortDirection = 'asc'; // } // this.sortTasks(); // } // } import { Component, OnInit } from '@angular/core'; import { TaskService } from 'src/app/services/task.service'; import { Task } from 'src/app/models/Itask'; import { FormsModule } from '@angular/forms'; @Component({ selector: 'app-task-list', templateUrl: './task-list.component.html', styleUrls: ['./task-list.component.css'], }) export class TaskListComponent implements OnInit { tasks: any[] = []; categories: string[] = ['All']; // Add a property to store categories newCategory: string = ''; // Property to store the new category input newTaskName: string = ''; newTaskCategory: string = 'All'; selectedCategory!: string; newTaskDueDate: string = ''; constructor(private taskService: TaskService) {} ngOnInit(): void { this.fetchTasks(); this.fetchCategories(); // Fetch existing categories } onCompletionStatusChange(completionStatus: boolean): void { // Use completionStatus as needed console.log('Completion Status Changed:', completionStatus); } // fetchTasks(): void { // this.taskService.getTasks().subscribe((tasks) => { // this.tasks = tasks.map((task) => ({ ...task, editing: false })); // }); // } fetchTasks(): void { this.taskService.getTasks().subscribe((tasks) => { this.tasks = tasks.sort((a, b) => { // Sort tasks by dueDate (if available) return ( (a.dueDate ? new Date(a.dueDate).getTime() : 0) - (b.dueDate ? new Date(b.dueDate).getTime() : 0) ); }); }); } // fetchCategories(): void { // // Fetch existing categories from your service or wherever they are stored // // For now, let's assume you have a method getCategories() in your service // this.taskService.getCategories().subscribe((categories) => { // this.categories = categories; // }); // } fetchCategories(): void { this.taskService.getCategories().subscribe((categories) => { this.categories = this.categories.concat(categories); }); } addCategory(): void { if ( this.newCategory.trim() !== '' && !this.categories.includes(this.newCategory) ) { this.categories.push(this.newCategory); this.newCategory = ''; // Clear the input field } } // fetchTasks(): void { // this.taskService.getTasks().subscribe((tasks) => { // this.tasks = tasks.map((task) => ({ ...task, editing: false })); // this.categories = Array.from( // new Set(this.tasks.map((task) => task.category)) // ); // }); // } deleteTask(taskId: number): void { this.taskService.deleteTask(taskId).subscribe(() => this.fetchTasks()); } editTask(task: any): void { task.editing = true; // Create a copy of the original task for editing task.editedTask = { ...task }; } updateTask(task: any): void { const updatedTask = { id: task.id, title: task.editedTask.title, completed: task.editedTask.completed, category: task.editedTask.category, dueDate: task.editedTask.dueDate, // Add the dueDate property }; this.taskService.updateTask(updatedTask).subscribe( (response) => { task.editing = false; // Update the task details in the tasks array const index = this.tasks.findIndex((t) => t.id === response.id); if (index !== -1) { this.tasks[index] = response; } }, (error) => { console.error('Error updating task:', error); } ); } cancelEdit(task: any): void { task.editing = false; } // task-list.component.ts // filterTasksByCategory(category: string): void { // const lowercaseCategory = category.toLowerCase(); // this.taskService.getTasksByCategory(lowercaseCategory).subscribe( // (tasks) => { // this.tasks = tasks.map((task) => ({ ...task, editing: false })); // }, // (error) => { // console.error('Error fetching tasks by category:', error); // } // ); // } // filterTasksByCategory(category: string): void { // console.log('Selected Category:', category); // this.taskService.getTasksByCategory(category).subscribe( // (tasks) => { // console.log('Filtered Tasks:', tasks); // this.tasks = tasks.map((task) => ({ ...task, editing: false })); // }, // (error) => { // console.error('Error fetching tasks by category:', error); // } // ); // } // filterTasksByCategory(category: string): void { // if (category === 'All') { // this.fetchTasks(); // Show all tasks // } else { // this.taskService.getTasksByCategory(category).subscribe((tasks) => { // this.tasks = tasks.map((task) => ({ ...task, editing: false })); // }); // } // } // filterTasksByCategory(category: string): void { // const encodedCategory = encodeURIComponent(category); // this.taskService.getTasksByCategory(encodedCategory).subscribe( // (tasks) => { // this.tasks = tasks.map((task) => ({ ...task, editing: false })); // }, // (error) => { // console.error('Error fetching tasks by category:', error); // } // ); // } filterTasksByCategory(category: string): void { this.taskService.getTasksByCategory(category).subscribe( (tasks) => { this.tasks = tasks; }, (error) => { console.error('Error fetching tasks by category:', error); } ); } addTask(taskName: string, category: string): void { // Validate that the task name is not empty if (taskName.trim() === '') { return; } const newTask: Task = { id: 0, title: taskName, completed: false, category: category, // Include the selected category dueDate: this.newTaskDueDate || undefined, // Adjust the type to string | undefined }; this.taskService.addTask(newTask).subscribe( (response) => { // Clear the input field and selected category this.newTaskName = ''; this.selectedCategory = 'All'; this.newTaskDueDate = ''; // Fetch updated tasks from the server this.fetchTasks(); }, (error) => { console.error('Error adding new task:', error); } ); } }
